zh.Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾朗 巴可比
zh.lifeSummary: Robin Robinus Robins ROBBINS ROBYNS是Robynes Knight of the French Court和Unknown的兒子，於1210年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾朗 巴可比。他和Mrs Robbins至少有1個兒子。他去世於1279年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Robins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the personal name Robin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Robin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Emile, Marcel, Achille, Armand, Arnaud, Camille, Julien, Michel, Normand.
French, Breton, Scottish, English, and German: from the personal name Robin, a pet form of Robert , composed of the short form Rob + the hypocoristic suffix -in.
Slovenian: topographic name derived from rob ‘edge, border’ (see Robar ).

nameMeanings.name: Robin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a pet form of Robert , from the short form Rob + the diminutive suffix -in (of Old French origin), but now nearly always used as an independent name. In recent years it has been increasingly used as a girl's name, partly under the influence of the vocabulary word denoting the bird.

variants.name: Robyn
meanings: Originally a pet form of Robert , from the short form Rob + the diminutive suffix -in (of Old French origin), but now nearly always used as an independent name. In recent years it has been increasingly used as a girl's name, partly under the influence of the vocabulary word denoting the bird.

variants.name: Robin
meanings: Originally a pet form of Robert , from the short form Rob + the diminutive suffix -in (of Old French origin), but now nearly always used as an independent name. In recent years it has been increasingly used as a girl's name, partly under the influence of the vocabulary word denoting the bird.

en.lifeSummary: Robin Robinus Robins ROBBINS ROBYNS was born in 1210, in Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robynes Knight of the French Court and Unknown. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Robbins. He died in 1279, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Robin Robinus Robins ROBBINS ROBYNS est né en 1210, à Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robynes Knight of the French Court et Unknown. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Robbins. Il est décédé en 1279, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robin Robinus Robins ROBBINS ROBYNSは1210年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアロング ブクビーでRobynes Knight of the French CourtとUnknownの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs Robbinsとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1279年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robin Robinus Robins ROBBINS ROBYNS(은)는 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 론그 벅비에서 Robynes Knight of the French Court(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs Robbins(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1279년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Robin Robinus Robins ROBBINS ROBYNS родился в 1210 г. в местности лонг буккби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Robynes Knight of the French Court и Unknown. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs Robbins. Он умер в 1279 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.
